description: Return a machine-friendly catalog of all tools that can appear in an action plan (transaction-only tools). Use this with action_list and execute: never call transaction-only tools directly. Flow: list_actions (discover) → action_list (submit plan, get validated plan) → user approves → execute (commit).

actions.description: List of tool definitions (name, description, inputSchema, annotations) that can be used in action_list plans.
